security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without adequate integrity checks.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks sufficient input validation for vote messages.

assumptions: The governance contract does not perform sufficient integrity checks on vote messages.
The actor can modify the vote message before it is submitted.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust input validation and integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may modify the contents of a vote message before it is submitted to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be submitted without proper authentication and authorization, leading to potential repudiation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide proper logging or auditing of votes.

assumptions: The system does not maintain a verifiable audit trail of votes.
The governance contract does not enforce authentication or authorization for votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a robust logging and auditing system to track votes and ensure accountability.

description: An attacker may submit a vote and deny having done so, making it difficult to hold them accountable.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information may be revealed to unauthorized parties through insecure data transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms to protect vote confidentiality.

assumptions: The system does not encrypt vote data during transmission or storage.
The actor can intercept vote data transmitted to the governance contract.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage and employ access controls.

description: An attacker may gain access to information about who voted for which proposal.
